texto: Stick and stones may break your bones but harsh words can hurt as much to anyone. What comes out of your tongue can be a bleating or a curse, or for better or for worst, so think several times for what you spit out can't be recover anymore.you should not spit flame, what will hurt just keep it . Think of the consequences after the damage.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Victoria Samio sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Stick and stones may break your bones but harsh words can hurt as much to anyone. What comes out …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, quote-about-life, think, útil em momentos de reflexao.
